quality.rationale: 基于FLRW度规的源计数推导涉及体积元积分、距离-红移关系及小z级数展开，物理逻辑链完整但题干未附解答过程

origin.question: 19.11 Let $\mathfrak{n}(\mathfrak{t}_0)$ be the number density at the present epoch of a (mythical) family of identical light or radio sources distributed uniformly throughout the universe.(a) Show that the number of such sources with redshifts less than $z$ as observed from the Earth today is$$\mathrm {N} (z) = \frac {4 \pi}{3} \frac {\mathrm {n} (\mathrm {t}_{0})}{\mathrm {H}_{0}^{3}} z^{3} \left(1 - \frac {3}{2} z (1 + \mathrm {q}_{0}) + \dot s\right).$$Ignore evolutionary effects, i.e. the number of sources in a unit comoving volume remains constant.
